---
title: "hako"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(GEOquery)

gse <- getGEO("GSE49454", GSEMatrix = TRUE)

expr <- exprs(gse[[1]])
meta <- pData(gse[[1]])

```

```{r}
dim(expr)
```

```{r}
grep("SLEDAI|sledai|activity", colnames(meta), value = TRUE)
grep("patient|subject|id", colnames(meta), value = TRUE)
grep("visit|time|week", colnames(meta), value = TRUE)


head(meta$title)

head(meta$characteristics_ch1)
```

```{r}
meta$sample_name <- meta$title

# Extract patient ID
meta$patient_id <- sub("V[0-9]+$", "", meta$sample_name)

# Extract visit number
meta$visit <- as.numeric(sub(".*V", "", meta$sample_name))

head(meta[, c("sample_name", "patient_id", "visit")])

View(expr[1:500, 1:20])
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

meta$sledai <- as.numeric(meta$`sledai:ch1`)

# sort properly
meta <- meta[order(meta$patient_id, meta$visit), ]

# pick a few patients
ids <- names(sort(table(meta$patient_id), decreasing=TRUE))[1:20]

plot_data <- meta[meta$patient_id %in% ids, ]

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = visit, y = sledai, group = patient_id, color = patient_id)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(title = "SLE Disease Activity Over Time (Example Patients)",
       x = "Visit",
       y = "SLEDAI Score")
```

```{r}
length(unique(meta$patient_id))
visit_counts <- table(meta$patient_id)
summary(visit_counts)
table(visit_counts)
```

```{r}
meta$sledai <- as.numeric(meta$`sledai:ch1`)

meta$activity_class <- cut(
  meta$sledai,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 6, 12, Inf),
  labels = c("Inactive", "Moderate", "Active")
)

table(meta$activity_class)
```

```{r}
## -----------------------------
# 1. CLEAN & CREATE TARGET
# -----------------------------
# Ensure the lead/future variable exists
meta <- meta[order(meta$patient_id, meta$visit), ]
meta$future_sledai <- ave(meta$sledai, meta$patient_id, FUN = function(x) c(x[-1], NA))

# Define binary cut: 0-6 Inactive, 6+ Active
meta$future_binary <- cut(
  meta$future_sledai,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 6, Inf),
  labels = c("Inactive", "Active")
)

# Drop NAs (patients with no future visit)
meta <- meta[!is.na(meta$future_binary), ]
meta$future_binary <- droplevels(meta$future_binary)

# -----------------------------
# 2. BETTER FEATURE SELECTION
# -----------------------------
# Instead of first 300 genes, take the 300 most variable genes
gene_vars <- apply(expr, 1, var)
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE))[1:300]

expr_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr[top_genes, ]))
colnames(expr_df) <- make.names(colnames(expr_df))
expr_df$geo_accession <- rownames(expr_df)

# Merge
data_bin <- merge(meta, expr_df, by = "geo_accession")

X <- data_bin[, make.names(top_genes)]
y <- data_bin$future_binary

# -----------------------------
# 3. STRATIFIED SPLIT
# -----------------------------
library(caret)
set.seed(123)
train_idx <- createDataPartition(y, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)

X_train <- X[train_idx, ]
y_train <- y[train_idx]
X_test <- X[-train_idx, ]
y_test <- y[-train_idx]

# -----------------------------
# 4. TRAIN WITH DOWNSAMPLING
# -----------------------------
library(randomForest)

# Calculate smallest class size for balancing
n_min <- min(table(y_train))

model_bin <- randomForest(
  x = X_train, 
  y = as.factor(y_train), 
  ntree = 1000,
  sampsize = c(n_min, n_min), # This fixes the 'always predict Active' bug
  importance = TRUE
)

# -----------------------------
# 5. EVALUATE
# -----------------------------
preds_bin <- predict(model_bin, X_test)
print("Binary Confusion Matrix (Balanced):")
print(table(Predicted = preds_bin, Actual = y_test))

accuracy <- mean(preds_bin == y_test)
cat("\nBalanced Accuracy:", round(accuracy, 4), "\n")

# Check which genes actually mattered
varImpPlot(model_bin, n.var = 10, main = "Top 10 Predictive Genes")
```

```{r}

# 1. Get the metadata
metadata <- pData(gse[[1]])

# 2. Identify columns with time-related keywords
# This looks for "time", "month", "day", "visit", etc.
time_keywords <- "time|month|day|duration|visit|year|week"
target_cols <- grep(time_keywords, colnames(metadata), ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)

# 3. Print the column names found and the first few rows
print("Time-related columns found:")
print(target_cols)

# 4. Show the data
if(length(target_cols) > 0) {
    head(metadata[, target_cols])
} else {
    print("No explicit time columns found beyond the 'Visit' titles.")
}
```

# Treatment Response

```{r}
gse <- getGEO("GSE224705", GSEMatrix = TRUE)
meta <- pData(gse[[1]])

colnames(meta)



```

```{r}
head(meta$`str4_response:ch1`, 20)
summary(meta$`str4_response:ch1`)
unique(meta$`str4_response:ch1`)

grep("response|responder|sri|drug|aza|mmf|soc|hc", colnames(meta), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)

head(meta[, grep("characteristics_ch1", colnames(meta), value = TRUE)], 10)
```

```{r}
table(meta$`diagnosis:ch1`)
```

```{r}
meta_sle <- meta[meta$`diagnosis:ch1` == "SLE", ]
```

```{r}

table(meta_sle$`sri4_response:ch1`)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(meta_sle, aes(x = response)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#2C7BB6") +
  labs(title = "Treatment Response Distribution",
       x = "Response",
       y = "Count")
```

```{r}
ggplot(meta_sle, aes(x = `drug_group:ch1`, fill = response)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Response Rate by Treatment",
       x = "Treatment",
       y = "Proportion") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("lightblue", "pink"))
```

```{r}
library(randomForest)

# -----------------------------
# 1. CLEAN RESPONSE
# -----------------------------
meta_sle$response <- ifelse(
  meta_sle$`sri4_response:ch1` == "YES",
  "Responder",
  "Non-responder"
)
meta_sle$response <- as.factor(meta_sle$response)

# -----------------------------
# 2. PREP EXPRESSION
# -----------------------------
# Transpose expression: Rows = Samples, Cols = Genes
expr_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr))
# Ensure the gene names are R-safe immediately
colnames(expr_df) <- make.names(colnames(expr_df))
# Create the merge key
expr_df$geo_accession <- rownames(expr_df)

# Merge
# IMPORTANT: Check if 'geo_accession' exists in meta_sle. 
# If it's the rownames of meta_sle instead of a column, we fix that here:
if(!"geo_accession" %in% colnames(meta_sle)) {
    meta_sle$geo_accession <- rownames(meta_sle)
}

data_combined <- merge(meta_sle, expr_df, by = "geo_accession")

# -----------------------------
# 3. ISOLATE GENE COLUMNS (The "Safe" Way)
# -----------------------------
# Instead of setdiff, let's just grab the columns we know came from expr_df
# which are now in data_combined
all_gene_names <- colnames(expr_df)[colnames(expr_df) != "geo_accession"]

# Verify we actually have data
if(length(all_gene_names) == 0) stop("No gene columns found after merge!")

# -----------------------------
# 4. FEATURE SELECTION
# -----------------------------
# Convert gene columns to numeric matrix for speed/reliability
gene_matrix <- as.matrix(data_combined[, all_gene_names])
storage.mode(gene_matrix) <- "numeric"

# Calculate variance, ignoring NAs
vars <- apply(gene_matrix, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)
vars <- vars[is.finite(vars)]

top_n <- min(200, length(vars))
top_genes <- names(sort(vars, decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n]

# Final Model Inputs
X <- as.data.frame(gene_matrix[, top_genes])
y <- data_combined$response

cat("Final Data Shape:", dim(X), "\n")
print(table(y))

# -----------------------------
# 5. TRAIN / TEST SPLIT & MODEL
# -----------------------------
set.seed(1)
train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = round(0.7 * nrow(X)))

model <- randomForest(
  x = X[train_idx, ], 
  y = y[train_idx], 
  xtest = X[-train_idx, ], 
  ytest = y[-train_idx],
  ntree = 500,
  importance = TRUE
)

# -----------------------------
# 6. EVALUATE
# -----------------------------
print(model$test$confusion)
varImpPlot(model, n.var = 10, main = "Top 10 Predictive Genes")
varImpPlot(model, n.var = 10, main = "Top 10 Predictive Genes")
```

```{r}
# 1. Ensure you have the CORRECT GSE loaded
gse_new <- getGEO("GSE224705", GSEMatrix = TRUE)
meta_sle <- pData(gse_new[[1]])
expr_new <- exprs(gse_new[[1]]) # This is the missing piece!

# 2. Filter for SLE patients only (as you did before)
meta_sle <- meta_sle[meta_sle$`diagnosis:ch1` == "SLE", ]

# 3. Define the response variable
meta_sle$response <- as.factor(ifelse(
  meta_sle$`sri4_response:ch1` == "YES", "Responder", "Non-responder"
))

# 4. ALIGNMENT
common_ids <- intersect(meta_sle$geo_accession, colnames(expr_new))

if(length(common_ids) == 0) {
  stop("IDs still don't match. Check if gse_new loaded correctly.")
}

final_expr <- expr_new[, common_ids]
final_meta <- meta_sle[match(common_ids, meta_sle$geo_accession), ]

cat("Success! Aligned", ncol(final_expr), "samples from the correct dataset.")
```

```{r}
library(randomForest)
library(caret)
library(pROC)

set.seed(42)

# -----------------------------
# 1. STRATIFIED TRAIN/TEST SPLIT
# -----------------------------
train_idx <- createDataPartition(final_meta$response, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)

meta_train <- final_meta[train_idx, ]
meta_test  <- final_meta[-train_idx, ]

expr_train <- final_expr[, rownames(meta_train)]
expr_test  <- final_expr[, rownames(meta_test)]

# -----------------------------
# 2. FEATURE SELECTION ON TRAIN ONLY
# -----------------------------
gene_vars <- apply(expr_train, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)

# try fewer genes first
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE))[1:20]

X_train <- as.data.frame(t(expr_train[top_genes, ]))
X_test  <- as.data.frame(t(expr_test[top_genes, ]))

colnames(X_train) <- make.names(colnames(X_train))
colnames(X_test)  <- make.names(colnames(X_test))

y_train <- factor(meta_train$response)
y_test  <- factor(meta_test$response)

# make sure class order is consistent
y_train <- factor(y_train, levels = c("Non-responder", "Responder"))
y_test  <- factor(y_test, levels = c("Non-responder", "Responder"))

# -----------------------------
# 3. HANDLE CLASS IMBALANCE
# -----------------------------
class_counts <- table(y_train)
minority_n <- min(class_counts)

rf_model <- randomForest(
  x = X_train,
  y = y_train,
  ntree = 1000,
  mtry = floor(sqrt(ncol(X_train))),
  importance = TRUE,
  sampsize = c(minority_n, minority_n)   # balanced sampling per tree
)

# -----------------------------
# 4. PREDICTIONS
# -----------------------------
pred_class <- predict(rf_model, X_test, type = "response")
pred_prob  <- predict(rf_model, X_test, type = "prob")[, "Responder"]

cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_class, y_test, positive = "Responder")
print(cm)

roc_obj <- roc(response = y_test, predictor = pred_prob, levels = rev(levels(y_test)))
cat("AUC:", auc(roc_obj), "\n")
```

```{r}
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)

set.seed(42)

# -----------------------------
# 1. TRAIN / TEST SPLIT
# -----------------------------
train_idx <- createDataPartition(final_meta$response, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)

meta_train <- final_meta[train_idx, ]
meta_test  <- final_meta[-train_idx, ]

expr_train <- final_expr[, rownames(meta_train)]
expr_test  <- final_expr[, rownames(meta_test)]

# -----------------------------
# 2. FEATURE SELECTION (TRAIN ONLY)
# -----------------------------
gene_vars <- apply(expr_train, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE))[1:20]

X_train <- as.data.frame(t(expr_train[top_genes, ]))
X_test  <- as.data.frame(t(expr_test[top_genes, ]))

colnames(X_train) <- make.names(colnames(X_train))
colnames(X_test)  <- make.names(colnames(X_test))

# -----------------------------
# 3. CLEAN CLASS NAMES
# -----------------------------
y_train <- factor(meta_train$response, levels = c("Non-responder", "Responder"))
y_test  <- factor(meta_test$response, levels = c("Non-responder", "Responder"))

levels(y_train) <- c("NonResponder", "Responder")
levels(y_test)  <- c("NonResponder", "Responder")

train_df <- X_train
train_df$response <- y_train

# -----------------------------
# 4. TRAIN CONTROL (SMOTE + CV)
# -----------------------------
ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 3,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  sampling = "smote"
)

# -----------------------------
# 5. TRAIN LASSO MODEL
# -----------------------------
lasso_fit <- train(
  response ~ .,
  data = train_df,
  method = "glmnet",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = expand.grid(
    alpha = 1,  # LASSO
    lambda = seq(0.001, 0.1, length = 20)
  )
)

print(lasso_fit)

# -----------------------------
# 6. PREDICTIONS
# -----------------------------
pred_prob <- predict(lasso_fit, X_test, type = "prob")[, "NonResponder"]

# threshold tuned for your goal
threshold <- 0.4

pred_class <- ifelse(pred_prob > threshold, "NonResponder", "Responder")
pred_class <- factor(pred_class, levels = c("NonResponder", "Responder"))

cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_class, y_test, positive = "NonResponder")
print(cm)

roc_obj <- roc(response = y_test,
               predictor = pred_prob,
               levels = c("Responder", "NonResponder"))

cat("AUC:", auc(roc_obj), "\n")
```

```{r}
library(caret)
library(e1071)

set.seed(42)

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 3,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  sampling = "smote"
)

svm_fit <- train(
  response ~ .,
  data = train_df,
  method = "svmRadial",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneLength = 5
)

print(svm_fit)

pred_prob <- predict(svm_fit, X_test, type = "prob")[, "NonResponder"]

threshold <- 0.6
pred_class <- ifelse(pred_prob > threshold, "NonResponder", "Responder")
pred_class <- factor(pred_class, levels = c("NonResponder", "Responder"))

confusionMatrix(pred_class, y_test, positive = "NonResponder")
```

# Model 2 Replacement

```{r}
library(GEOquery)

gse <- getGEO("GSE65391", GSEMatrix = TRUE)

expr <- exprs(gse[[1]])
meta <- pData(gse[[1]])
```

```{r}
dim(expr)
dim(meta)

colnames(meta)
```

```{r}
meta$patient <- meta$`subject:ch1`
meta$visit   <- as.numeric(meta$`visit:ch1`)
meta$sledai  <- as.numeric(meta$`sledai:ch1`)


meta$activity <- ifelse(meta$sledai >=4 "Active", "Inactive")
meta$activity <- factor(meta$activity, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))

expr_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr))
expr_df$geo_accession <- rownames(expr_df)

meta$geo_accession <- rownames(meta)

data <- merge(meta, expr_df, by = "geo_accession")


data <- data[order(data$patient, data$visit), ]


library(dplyr)

data <- data %>%
  group_by(patient) %>%
  mutate(next_activity = lead(activity)) %>%
  ungroup()

data <- data[!is.na(data$next_activity), ]

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(meta, aes(x = sledai)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of SLE Disease Activity (SLEDAI)",
       x = "SLEDAI Score",
       y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()


ggplot(meta, aes(x = activity)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Class Distribution: Active vs Inactive SLE",
       x = "Disease State",
       y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()


library(dplyr)

# sample a few patients for clarity
set.seed(1)
sample_patients <- sample(unique(meta$patient), 10)

plot_data <- meta %>% filter(patient %in% sample_patients)

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = visit, y = sledai, group = patient, color = patient)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Longitudinal SLE Disease Activity (Sample Patients)",
       x = "Visit",
       y = "SLEDAI Score") http://127.0.0.1:31915/chunk_output/F3B02D3114f6648d/A139F37A/cntm870y8sq3e/000016.png+
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
meta_clean <- meta[!is.na(meta$activity), ]

ggplot(meta_clean, aes(x = activity)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Class Distribution: Active vs Inactive SLE")
```

```{r}
library(GEOquery)
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(e1071)

# -----------------------------
# 1. LOAD DATA
# -----------------------------
gse <- getGEO("GSE65391", GSEMatrix = TRUE)

expr <- exprs(gse[[1]])
meta <- pData(gse[[1]])

# -----------------------------
# 2. CLEAN OUTCOME + IDS
# -----------------------------
meta$sledai <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta$`sledai:ch1`))
meta$activity <- ifelse(meta$sledai >= 4, "Active", "Inactive")
meta$activity <- factor(meta$activity, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))

meta$geo_accession <- rownames(meta)

# expression: samples x genes
expr_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr))
expr_df$geo_accession <- rownames(expr_df)

# merge metadata + expression
data <- merge(meta, expr_df, by = "geo_accession")

# -----------------------------
# 3. LONGITUDINAL SETUP
# -----------------------------
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    patient   = `subject:ch1`,
    visit_raw = `visit:ch1`,
    visit     = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(`visit:ch1`))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(patient), !is.na(visit), !is.na(sledai), !is.na(activity)) %>%
  arrange(patient, visit) %>%
  group_by(patient) %>%
  mutate(next_activity = lead(activity)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(next_activity))

# quick check
print(table(data$next_activity))

# -----------------------------
# 4. TRAIN / TEST SPLIT
# -----------------------------
set.seed(42)
train_idx <- createDataPartition(data$next_activity, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)

train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
test_data  <- data[-train_idx, ]

# -----------------------------
# 5. FEATURE SELECTION ON TRAIN ONLY
# -----------------------------
# only true gene-expression columns
gene_cols <- setdiff(colnames(expr_df), "geo_accession")

X_train_full <- train_data[, gene_cols]
X_test_full  <- test_data[, gene_cols]

# force numeric
X_train_full <- data.frame(lapply(X_train_full, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x))))
X_test_full  <- data.frame(lapply(X_test_full, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x))))

# remove columns that are all NA or zero variance in TRAIN
keep <- sapply(X_train_full, function(x) !all(is.na(x)) && var(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
X_train_full <- X_train_full[, keep]
X_test_full  <- X_test_full[, keep]

# top 20 most variable genes from TRAIN only
gene_vars <- sapply(X_train_full, var, na.rm = TRUE)
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE))[1:20]

X_train <- X_train_full[, top_genes]
X_test  <- X_test_full[, top_genes]

y_train <- factor(train_data$next_activity, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))
y_test  <- factor(test_data$next_activity, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))

colnames(X_train) <- make.names(colnames(X_train))
colnames(X_test)  <- make.names(colnames(X_test))

# optional checks
print(dim(X_train))
print(sum(is.na(X_train)))
print(table(y_train))

# -----------------------------
# 6. TRAIN SVM
# -----------------------------
ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 3,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  sampling = "smote"
)

set.seed(42)
svm_fit <- train(
  x = X_train,
  y = y_train,
  method = "svmRadial",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneLength = 5
)

print(svm_fit)

# -----------------------------
# 7. EVALUATE
# -----------------------------
pred_prob <- predict(svm_fit, X_test, type = "prob")[, "Active"]

threshold <- 0.5
pred_class <- ifelse(pred_prob > threshold, "Active", "Inactive")
pred_class <- factor(pred_class, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))

cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_class, y_test, positive = "Active")
print(cm)

roc_obj <- roc(y_test, pred_prob, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))
cat("AUC:", auc(roc_obj), "\n")

```

```{r}
gse_49454 <- getGEO("GSE49454", GSEMatrix = TRUE)

expr_49454 <- exprs(gse_49454[[1]])
meta_49454 <- pData(gse_49454[[1]])


gse_65391 <- getGEO("GSE65391", GSEMatrix = TRUE)

expr_65391 <- exprs(gse_65391[[1]])
meta_65391 <- pData(gse_65391[[1]])


genes_49454 <- rownames(expr_49454)
genes_65391 <- rownames(expr_65391)

common_genes <- intersect(genes_49454, genes_65391)

length(common_genes)
```

```{r}
expr_49454 <- expr_49454[common_genes, ]
expr_65391 <- expr_65391[common_genes, ]
```

```{r}
library(GEOquery)

# -----------------------------
# 1. LOAD BOTH DATASETS
# -----------------------------
gse_49454 <- getGEO("GSE49454", GSEMatrix = TRUE)
expr_49454 <- exprs(gse_49454[[1]])
meta_49454 <- pData(gse_49454[[1]])

gse_65391 <- getGEO("GSE65391", GSEMatrix = TRUE)
expr_65391 <- exprs(gse_65391[[1]])
meta_65391 <- pData(gse_65391[[1]])

# -----------------------------
# 2. FIND COMMON GENES
# -----------------------------
common_genes <- intersect(rownames(expr_49454), rownames(expr_65391))
length(common_genes)

expr_49454 <- expr_49454[common_genes, ]
expr_65391 <- expr_65391[common_genes, ]

# -----------------------------
# 3. CREATE CONSISTENT LABELS
# -----------------------------
# GSE49454
meta_49454$sledai <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta_49454$`sledai:ch1`))
meta_49454$activity <- ifelse(meta_49454$sledai >= 4, "Active", "Inactive")

# GSE65391
meta_65391$sledai <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta_65391$`sledai:ch1`))
meta_65391$activity <- ifelse(meta_65391$sledai >= 4, "Active", "Inactive")

# remove missing
meta_49454 <- meta_49454[!is.na(meta_49454$activity), ]
meta_65391 <- meta_65391[!is.na(meta_65391$activity), ]

# -----------------------------
# 4. ALIGN EXPRESSION WITH META
# -----------------------------
expr_49454_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_49454))
expr_49454_df$geo_accession <- rownames(expr_49454_df)

expr_65391_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_65391))
expr_65391_df$geo_accession <- rownames(expr_65391_df)

meta_49454$geo_accession <- rownames(meta_49454)
meta_65391$geo_accession <- rownames(meta_65391)

data_49454 <- merge(meta_49454[, c("geo_accession", "activity")],
                    expr_49454_df, by = "geo_accession")

data_65391 <- merge(meta_65391[, c("geo_accession", "activity")],
                    expr_65391_df, by = "geo_accession")

# -----------------------------
# 5. COMBINE DATASETS
# -----------------------------
data_combined <- rbind(data_49454, data_65391)

# -----------------------------
# 6. PRINT CLASS BALANCE
# -----------------------------
table(data_combined$activity)
prop.table(table(data_combined$activity))
```

```{r}
library(randomForest)
library(caret)
library(pROC)

set.seed(42)

# -----------------------------
# 1. PREP DATA
# -----------------------------
data_combined$activity <- factor(data_combined$activity,
                                 levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))

# split
train_idx <- createDataPartition(data_combined$activity, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)

train_data <- data_combined[train_idx, ]
test_data  <- data_combined[-train_idx, ]

# -----------------------------
# 2. FEATURE SELECTION (TRAIN ONLY)
# -----------------------------
gene_cols <- setdiff(colnames(train_data), c("geo_accession", "activity", "dataset"))

# ensure numeric
train_data[, gene_cols] <- lapply(train_data[, gene_cols], function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
test_data[, gene_cols]  <- lapply(test_data[, gene_cols], function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))

# remove bad columns
keep <- sapply(train_data[, gene_cols], function(x) !all(is.na(x)) && var(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)

gene_cols <- gene_cols[keep]

# select top 20 genes
gene_vars <- sapply(train_data[, gene_cols], var, na.rm = TRUE)
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE))[1:20]

X_train <- train_data[, top_genes]
X_test  <- test_data[, top_genes]

y_train <- train_data$activity
y_test  <- test_data$activity

# -----------------------------
# 3. HANDLE IMBALANCE (VERY IMPORTANT)
# -----------------------------
class_counts <- table(y_train)
minority_n <- min(class_counts)

rf_model <- randomForest(
  x = X_train,
  y = y_train,
  ntree = 500,
  mtry = floor(sqrt(ncol(X_train))),
  sampsize = c(minority_n, minority_n),  # balanced sampling
  importance = TRUE
)

print(rf_model)

# -----------------------------
# 4. PREDICT
# -----------------------------
pred_class <- predict(rf_model, X_test, type = "response")
pred_prob  <- predict(rf_model, X_test, type = "prob")[, "Active"]

# -----------------------------
# 5. EVALUATE
# -----------------------------
cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_class, y_test, positive = "Active")
print(cm)

roc_obj <- roc(y_test, pred_prob, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))
cat("AUC:", auc(roc_obj), "\n")
```

```{r}
library(xgboost)
library(caret)
library(pROC)

set.seed(42)

# -----------------------------
# 1. PREP DATA
# -----------------------------
y_train_num <- ifelse(y_train == "Active", 1, 0)
y_test_num  <- ifelse(y_test == "Active", 1, 0)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(X_train), label = y_train_num)
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(X_test), label = y_test_num)

# handle imbalance
scale_pos_weight <- sum(y_train == "Inactive") / sum(y_train == "Active")

# -----------------------------
# 2. TRAIN MODEL
# -----------------------------
xgb_model <- xgb.train(
  params = list(
    objective = "binary:logistic",
    eval_metric = "auc",
    max_depth = 4,
    eta = 0.1,
    subsample = 0.8,
    colsample_bytree = 0.8,
    scale_pos_weight = scale_pos_weight
  ),
  data = dtrain,
  nrounds = 100,
  verbose = 0
)

# -----------------------------
# 3. PREDICT
# -----------------------------
pred_prob <- predict(xgb_model, dtest)

pred_class <- ifelse(pred_prob > 0.5, "Active", "Inactive")
pred_class <- factor(pred_class, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. EVALUATE
# -----------------------------
cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_class, y_test, positive = "Active")
print(cm)

roc_obj <- roc(y_test, pred_prob, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))
cat("AUC:", auc(roc_obj), "\n")
```

```{r}
install.packages("xgboost")
```

```{r}
library(caret)
library(pROC)

set.seed(42)

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 3,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  sampling = "smote"
)

glmnet_fit <- train(
  x = X_train,
  y = y_train,
  method = "glmnet",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneLength = 10
)

print(glmnet_fit)

# -----------------------------
# PREDICT
# -----------------------------
pred_prob <- predict(glmnet_fit, X_test, type = "prob")[, "Active"]

pred_class <- ifelse(pred_prob > 0.5, "Active", "Inactive")
pred_class <- factor(pred_class, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))

cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_class, y_test, positive = "Active")
print(cm)

roc_obj <- roc(y_test, pred_prob, levels = c("Inactive", "Active"))
cat("AUC:", auc(roc_obj), "\n")
```
